article_title: mGluR2/3 blockade produces rapid and long-lasting reversal of anhedonia caused by chronic stress exposure

aggregated_relations.subject: Group II mGluRs
evidence_sentences: Group II mGluRs consist of mGluR2 and mGluR3 subtypes and are seven transmembrane G-protein coupled receptors that negatively regulate adenylyl cyclase and function to decrease neurotransmitter release.

aggregated_relations.subject: Group II mGluRs
evidence_sentences: Group II mGluRs consist of mGluR2 and mGluR3 subtypes and are seven transmembrane G-protein coupled receptors that negatively regulate adenylyl cyclase and function to decrease neurotransmitter release.

aggregated_relations.subject: antagonists of Group II mGluRs
evidence_sentences: Additionally, a number of studies have demonstrated that antagonists of Group II mGluRs produce robust antidepressant responses in acute rodent models [11, 12].

aggregated_relations.subject: mGluR2/3 antagonists
relation_raw_variants: produce rapid and transient increases in
evidence_sentences: Much like ketamine, mGluR2/3 antagonists produce rapid and transient increases in glutamate release in the mPFC [13, 14].

aggregated_relations.subject: Blockade of post-synaptic AMPA receptors
aggregated_relations.object: antidepressant effects of ketamine and mGluR2/3 antagonists
evidence_sentences: Blockade of post-synaptic AMPA receptors blocks the antidepressant effects of both ketamine and mGluR2/3 antagonists in rodent models [15, 16].

aggregated_relations.subject: LY341495
evidence_sentences: The selective mGluR2/3 antagonist LY341495 increases activity of mTORC1 and its two major downstream substrates, p70 S6 kinase and 4E-BP1 [17].

aggregated_relations.subject: LY341495
evidence_sentences: LY341495 reversed the stress-induced decrease in sucrose preference 48 hrs after a single treatment, indicating a rapid antidepressant effect.
LY341495 reversed the stress-induced decrease in sucrose preference 48 hrs after a single treatment, indicating a rapid antidepressant effect.

aggregated_relations.subject: LY341495
evidence_sentences: Much like the data observed at 48 hours post-injection, CUS-induced anhedonia was still significantly blocked in rats that were administered LY341495 10 days earlier, demonstrating a long-lasting antidepressant response following a single treatment (Figure 2).
Much like the data observed at 48 hours post-injection, CUS-induced anhedonia was still significantly blocked in rats that were administered LY341495 10 days earlier

CUS-induced anhedonia was still significantly blocked in rats that were administered LY341495 10 days earlier, demonstrating a long-lasting antidepressant response following a single treatment (Figure 2).

aggregated_relations.subject: LY341495
evidence_sentences: Given that LY341495 produces a very similar biochemical signature to ketamine (i.e. increases in mTORC1 signaling and synaptic protein content), which is required for the antidepressant effects of mGluR2/3 blockade.

aggregated_relations.subject: LY341495
evidence_sentences: Given that LY341495 produces a very similar biochemical signature to ketamine (i.e. increases in mTORC1 signaling and synaptic protein content)

aggregated_relations.subject: mGluR2/3 antagonists
evidence_sentences: Taken together, the data presented here demonstrate that mGluR2/3 antagonists are capable of producing rapid and long-lasting antidepressant effects.

aggregated_relations.subject: typical antidepressants
evidence_sentences: For example, typical antidepressants fail to reverse the effects of chronic stress following 1 week of treatment [19].
typical antidepressants fail to reverse the effects of chronic stress following 1 week of treatment [19].
